# Bloodshed Mod Toolkit

> BepInEx mod for Bloodshed (Unity IL2CPP, Windows x64) — God Mode, 4-player Steam P2P co-op, difficulty tweaks, AI bots. Press F5 in-game to open the menu.

## Overview
- GitHub: https://github.com/myso-kr/bloodshed-mod-toolkit
- Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2747550/Bloodshed/
- License: MIT (© 2024 myso-kr)
- Game engine: Unity IL2CPP, BepInEx 6.x IL2CPP + HarmonyX

## Features
- CHEATS: God Mode, Infinite Gems, Infinite Revives, Speed Hack, One-Hit Kill, No Cooldown, No Reload, No Recoil, Perfect Aim, Force Level Up
- TWEAKS: 5 difficulty presets, 9 balance sliders (enemy speed, spawn count, player HP, etc.)
- CO-OP: 4-player Steam P2P lobby (invite friends, XP share, mission gate voting, in-game chat)
- BOTS: Up to 3 AI companion bots per session
- Hotkeys: F5 toggle, F1/F2/F3/F4 tab switch, F6 God Mode, F7 One-Hit Kill

## Installation
- Requires: BepInEx 6.x IL2CPP be.697+ for Windows x64
- Download installer from GitHub Releases and run, OR manually place DLL in BepInEx/plugins/
- Game path: Steam → Bloodshed → right-click → Manage → Browse local files
